# SENS ADVISOR - Professional Website

Single-page website for Jorge A. Arroyo, xP&A Consultant.

## Tech Stack
- Pure HTML/CSS/JavaScript
- Source Code Pro font (Google Fonts)
- Microsoft Clarity analytics

## Deployment
Static site hosted on GitHub Pages. The 4 analytics sub-folders
(`/outages/`, `/rentals/`, `/recession/`, `/pr-lmci/`) are
**regenerated by their source repos' workflows** and pushed
here — don't hand-edit them, edit the source template/generator
in the sibling repo instead.

Cross-repo push uses the `sensadvisor-deploy` GitHub App
(contents:write on this repo only). Each source repo has
`APP_ID` and `APP_PRIVATE_KEY` secrets; workflows mint a
short-lived token via `actions/create-github-app-token@v1`.
